description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo/hugo_extended:latest and runs a before_script installing git with 'apk add --update --no-cache git' for all jobs. Define the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY set to recursive. Add a test job named test that runs in the default test stage, executes the command 'hugo', and is configured with an except rule so it runs on every branch except master. Add a pages job named pages that runs in the deploy stage, runs the command 'hugo', publishes the generated 'public' directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch with an only rule.
